title: Scale Your DeFi Research with Static Analysis
description:
Jason Tanner, Security Researcher, Hexens

DeFi security research moves fast. This talk shows how static analysis helps you find more issues in less time. We’ll compare it with other methods, build one query live, and show how static analysis levels up your research at scale.

https://defisecuritysummit.org/schedule
track: DeFi Security Summit 2025 - Nogal Stage - Day 1
